definition: mnemonic code used to identify the requirement for electrical connection to the die substrate

definition_ml.en: mnemonic code used to identify the requirement for electrical connection to the die substrate

remark: Where the value of the code is ISOL, no connection may be made to the substrate. |Where the value of the code is OPT connection to the substrate is optional but any connection made must be to the supply as defined by substrate connection. |Where the value of the code is CONN a connection from the substrate to a terminal on the die or to a supply terminal is mandatory. |Where the value of the code is N/A connection to the substrate is not appropriate or not possible. |Where the value of the code is N/K no information on the connection requirement is available.

remark_ml.en: Where the value of the code is ISOL, no connection may be made to the substrate. |Where the value of the code is OPT connection to the substrate is optional but any connection made must be to the supply as defined by substrate connection. |Where the value of the code is CONN a connection from the substrate to a terminal on the die or to a supply terminal is mandatory. |Where the value of the code is N/A connection to the substrate is not appropriate or not possible. |Where the value of the code is N/K no information on the connection requirement is available.

raw_properties.MDC_P009.en: Where the value of the code is ISOL, no connection may be made to the substrate. |Where the value of the code is OPT connection to the substrate is optional but any connection made must be to the supply as defined by substrate connection. |Where the value of the code is CONN a connection from the substrate to a terminal on the die or to a supply terminal is mandatory. |Where the value of the code is N/A connection to the substrate is not appropriate or not possible. |Where the value of the code is N/K no information on the connection requirement is available.
